title: Bauhinia runyonii
taxonomy: Bauhinia runyonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. It belongs to the genus Bauhinia, which consists of around 150 species of flowering plants. The plant is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Bauhinia runyonii is also a member of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae, which includes over 2,000 species of flowering plants. Its classification is further supported by its characteristic fruit and seed morphology, typical of the Fabaceae family.
